shortDescription.text: Batch processing probe skipped for stdio transport because current official MCP SDK baselines do not reliably answer raw JSON-RPC batch arrays over newline-delimited stdio.

fullDescription.text: Batch processing probe skipped for stdio transport because current official MCP SDK baselines do not reliably answer raw JSON-RPC batch arrays over newline-delimited stdio.

help.text: Do not treat raw JSON-RPC batch arrays as a hard failure when the negotiated transport does not advertise reliable batch support.

shortDescription.text: Synthetic load probe executed against tools/list using 20 requests at concurrency 4.

fullDescription.text: Synthetic load probe executed against tools/list using 20 requests at concurrency 4.

help.text: Interpret this as a generic pressure probe, not a workload-specific SLA benchmark.

shortDescription.text: Malformed JSON probing is enabled, but the active transport did not expose a parse-error test.

fullDescription.text: Malformed JSON probing is enabled, but the active transport did not expose a parse-error test.

help.text: Extend the transport harness if this probe must become a first-class validation requirement.
